parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'Validation failed', errors: $json.errors, missing_fields: $json.missing_fields }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'Business already registered', message: 'A business with this email already exists' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ business_name: $json.business_name || null, email: $json.email, telegram_chat_id: $json.telegram_chat_id || null, website_url: $json.website_url || null, domain: $json.domain || null, wc_consumer_key_encrypted: $json.consumer_key || null, wc_consumer_secret_encrypted: $json.consumer_secret || null, status: $json.status, registered_at: $json.registered_at, sync_status: 'pending' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'Database error', message: 'Unable to create business profile. Please try again.', detail: $json.error }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $('Store Business Profile').first().json.business_id, api_key: $('Generate Secure Credentials').first().json.api_key, webhook_secret: $('Generate Secure Credentials').first().json.webhook_secret, is_active: true }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'Database error', message: 'Unable to store API credentials. Registration rolled back. Please try again.' }) }}

parameters.subject: Welcome to Business Automation Platform - Your Account is Ready
parameters.message:
=

Welcome to the Business Automation Platform!

Dear {{ $('Validate Inputs').first().json.business_name }},

Your business has been successfully registered.

Your Account Details:

  • Business ID: {{ $('Store Business Profile').first().json.business_id }}
  • API Key: {{ $('Get API Credentials').first().json.api_key }}
  • Lead Capture Webhook: https://n8n.mtsolutions.fun/webhook/lead-capture

Best regards,
The BizFlow Team

parameters.text:
=🎉 *Welcome to BizFlow!*

Your business *{{ $('Validate Inputs').first().json.business_name }}* is now registered and syncing.

📋 *Your Details:*
• Business ID: `{{ $('Store Business Profile').first().json.business_id }}`
• API Key: `{{ $('Get API Credentials').first().json.api_key }}`

💬 *You can now ask me:*
• "What are my sales today?"
• "Check inventory"
• "Show this week's report"

Type anything to get started! 🚀

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: 'BizFlow Order Created', topic: 'order.created', delivery_url: 'https://n8n.mtsolutions.fun/webhook/lead-capture', secret: $('Get API Credentials').first().json.webhook_secret, status: 'active' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $json.business_id, wc_customer_id: $json.wc_customer_id || null, name: $json.name || null, email: $json.email || null, phone_number: $json.phone_number || null }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ sync_status: 'completed', sync_completed_at: new Date().toISOString(), products_count: $json.sync_results.products_synced, orders_count: $json.sync_results.orders_synced }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, business_id: $('Store Business Profile').first().json.business_id, api_key: $('Get API Credentials').first().json.api_key, message: 'Business registered successfully! Data sync running in background.', registered_at: $('Store Business Profile').first().json.registered_at, lead_capture_webhook_url: 'https://n8n.mtsolutions.fun/webhook/lead-capture' }) }}
